zh.Morgannwg Gwlad, Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根
zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain ap Hywel of Powys於0870年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan45歲，母親Lleucu ferch Enflew44歲。他於0890年之前與Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於0930年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根享年60歲。

zh-hans.Morgannwg Gwlad, Glamorgan, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owain ap Hywel of Powys于0870年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan45岁，母亲Lleucu ferch Enflew44岁。他于0890年之前与Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于0930年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Powys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Powis
meanings: Welsh (now mainly West Midlands of England): habitational name from the region of Powis in mid Wales (from Old Welsh powes ‘country dwellers’).

en.lifeSummary: When Owain ap Hywel of Powys was born in 0870, in Wales, his father, Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, was 45 and his mother, Lleucu ferch Enflew, was 44. He married Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey before 0890. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 0930, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owain ap Hywel of Powys est né en 0870, à Galles, son père, Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lleucu ferch Enflew, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey avant 0890. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 0930, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owain ap Hywel of Powys 0870 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan 45 und seine Mutter Lleucu ferch Enflew 44. Er hat vor 0890 Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 0930 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Morgannwg Gwlad, Glamorgan, Wales: Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Hywel of Powys è nato il nel 0870 nel Galles, il suo padre, Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Lleucu ferch Enflew, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey prima del 0890. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 0930, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain ap Hywel of Powysが0870年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorganは45歳，母Lleucu ferch Enflewは44歳であった。0890年以前にNest ferch Rhodri of Angleseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は0930年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain ap Hywel of Powys(이)가 0870년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Lleucu ferch Enflew(은)는 44세였다. 그는 0890년 이전 Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 0930년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owain ap Hywel of Powys nasceu em 0870, em Gales, seu pai, Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lleucu ferch Enflew, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey antes 0890. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 0930, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain ap Hywel of Powys родился в 0870 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lleucu ferch Enflew, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey перед 0890 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 0930 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Owain ap Hywel of Powys nació en 0870, en Gales, su papá, Hywel ap Rhys of Glamorgan, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Lleucu ferch Enflew, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Nest ferch Rhodri of Anglesey antes de 0890. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 0930, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
